commands.cmd: pnpm exec prettier --check src/lib/nutrition-access.ts src/lib/domain/nutrition-profile.ts tests/unit/nutrition-access.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts
pnpm exec eslint src/lib/nutrition-access.ts src/lib/domain/nutrition-profile.ts tests/unit/nutrition-access.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts
pnpm vitest run --project unit tests/unit/nutrition-access.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts
git diff --check -- src/lib/nutrition-access.ts src/lib/domain/nutrition-profile.ts tests/unit/nutrition-access.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts

summary: Added a server-only local Nutrition access boundary with versioned salted scrypt credential hashing, constant-time verification, signed fixed-audience sessions, access-version revocation support, strict lifetime/future-skew/expiry/tamper validation and bounded payloads. Added optional-sensitive profile validation, explicit estimated-target consent and input gates, dietary/allergy/exclusion data, privacy/comparison settings, versioned target/minimum/range/limit goals, body measurements, and deny-by-default owner/guardian/granular-viewer authorization with anonymized comparison disclosure and grant expiry. Added 32 focused tests. No config, route, schema, migration, Pantry, UI or unrelated file was touched.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Worker exceeded the single-wait limit without writing files, so the PM executed the same four-file package as permitted fallback.
